overview: A service availability calendar for TIGOY.com where clients can browse open time slots and book appointments with John's Plumbing. Providers see a real-time 3-day window of available hours, and bookings are saved instantly.
features: 3-day calendar with hourly slots from 9AM to 5PM
Date navigation to browse forward and backward
Booking modal with name, phone, and issue description
Real-time availability — booked slots disappear for all users
Ad banners at top and bottom
